message:
feat: rewrite native-addon membrane for safety-membrane and fast-path routing

Replace the capability-planning native-addon membrane with a
safety-membrane implementation that enforces handle discipline,
crash-containment behavior, and fast-path vs fallback routing over the
hostcall session channel.

The old module inventoried addon cohorts and derived ABI fingerprints;
the new module models the runtime membrane itself with handle lifecycle
tracking, routing verdicts, crash containment policies, and evidence
receipts. All fractional values now use fixed-point millionths.

Integration tests are fully rewritten to exercise the new membrane API
surface including handle allocation/revocation, routing verdict
adjudication, crash containment, and evidence receipt generation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
